# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'BUILD_TYPE',
            choices: ['custom', 'standard'],
            description: 'Select build type'
        )
        string(
            name: 'CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Enter custom build commands separated by semicolon'
        )
        string(
            name: 'CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPTS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Enter custom test scripts separated by semicolon'
        )
        string(
            name: 'CUSTOM_DEPLOY_STEPS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Enter custom deployment steps separated by semicolon'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'RUN_TESTS',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Run tests after build'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DEPLOY_ARTIFACTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Deploy artifacts after tests'
        )
    }
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.BUILD_TYPE == 'custom') {
                        if (params.CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMANDS) {
                            def commands = params.CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMANDS.split(';')
                            for (cmd in commands) {
                                sh cmd.trim()
                            }
                        } else {
                            echo 'No custom build commands provided'
                        }
                    } else {
                        sh 'echo "Running standard build process"'
                        sh 'make build'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.RUN_TESTS) {
                        if (params.CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPTS) {
                            def scripts = params.CUSTOM_TEST_SCRIPTS.split(';')
                            for (script in scripts) {
                                sh script.trim()
                            }
                        } else {
                            sh 'echo "Running standard tests"'
                            sh 'make test'
                        }
                    } else {
                        echo 'Skipping tests as requested'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.DEPLOY_ARTIFACTS) {
                        if (params.CUSTOM_DEPLOY_STEPS) {
                            def steps = params.CUSTOM_DEPLOY_STEPS.split(';')
                            for (step in steps) {
                                sh step.trim()
                            }
                        } else {
                            sh 'echo "Running standard deployment"'
                            sh 'make deploy'
                        }
                    } else {
                        echo 'Skipping deployment as requested'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    post {
        always {
            echo 'Pipeline completed'
        }
        success {
            echo 'Build succeeded'
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Build failed'
        }
    }
}
